summary: Soundboard recording of decent quality captures a standout second set highlighted by epic Scarlet > Fire and a superb Playing‑Wheel‑China Doll sequence.
review: The show shines in the second half where Scarlet > Fire, Playing in the Band into The Wheel and China Doll are described as monster performances. While the first set is seen as uneven, the overall musical level is solid and the sbd tape sounds good though it has a few patched or muffled moments.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise the musical performance, especially the second set, and note the recording is generally good; only a few criticisms lower the average but not enough to drop it below a strong‑plus rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and well‑balanced soundboard tape, described as "very nice sbd" and "good sound," but with occasional patched or muffled sections (e.g., Minglewood) and not completely flawless.

standout_songs: Playing in the Band > The Wheel > China Doll
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is solid but uneven, with a few lackluster moments; the second set is a monster, featuring seamless transitions—most notably Scarlet > Fire into Playing in the Band and The Wheel—delivering high energy and memorable jams.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for expansive jamming, "warp‑speed space noodles" and being the MVP of the night; a few anecdotes hint at tension with Bobby's vocal style.
band_member_comments.Bob: His vocals on Around and Around are called odd, boring, and even irritating by several reviewers.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboards) is noted as having settled into an integral role in the band’s 1981 sound.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums/Space section described positively, with good interplay leading into The Wheel.
